CAISO · Day-ahead market · Solar capture analysis

Solar capture price — NP15 & SP15

Loading...
Hub
Month
Executive summary
    Figure 1
    Daily solar capture price vs average LMP
    Generation-weighted capture price vs simple average. Shaded gap = value discount. Bars = daily solar generation (RHS).
    Avg LMP Capture price Solar gen (GWh)
    Figure 2
    Duck curve — hourly price vs generation
    Avg price and solar MW by hour of day. The inverse shape is the core driver of the capture discount.
    Avg LMP ($/MWh) Avg solar (GW)
    Figure 3
    LMP heatmap — hour × day of week
    Average price by hour and weekday. Midday suppression visible across all days; weekends most pronounced.
    −$20
    $90+
    Figure 4
    Price vs solar generation — cannibalization scatter
    Each point is one hour with solar > 0. Downward slope quantifies the cannibalization effect: higher solar output → lower prices → lower capture value.
